findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "quantum_signing_key" references sensitive artifacts (private key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Quantum Signing Key Generator: Generate Ed25519 or secp256k1 signing keypairs from real ANU quantum entropy. Returns private key and public key pair.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: agent_context · Private data: einstein_trade_signals, top_gainers_comprehensive, whale_tracking, smart_money, wallet_pnl, security_scan, approval_security_scan, claimable_airdrops, forgotten_assets_scan, mempool_watch, holder_concentration, token_sniping, wallet_portfolio, pump_fun_launches, zora_launches, technical_analysis, wallet_trust_score, brc20_analytics, pqc_wallet_scan, quantum_wallet_generation, quantum_signing_key, quantum_portfolio_monitor, pqc_migration_planner, mev_protection, polymarket_insider_scan, yield_discover, yield_deposit, yield_rebalance, mindyield_vaults_list, mindyield_yield_vault_deposit · Public sink: general_analysis, pqc_migration_planner, agent_context, backtest_strategy, optimize_strategy_params, strategy_allocation_recommendation, generate_video · Destructive: crqc_proximity_benchmark, backtest_strategy, optimize_strategy_params, strategy_allocation_recommendation.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: agent_context · Private data: einstein_trade_signals, top_gainers_comprehensive, whale_tracking, smart_money, wallet_pnl, security_scan, approval_security_scan, claimable_airdrops, forgotten_assets_scan, mempool_watch, holder_concentration, token_sniping, wallet_portfolio, pump_fun_launches, zora_launches, technical_analysis, wallet_trust_score, brc20_analytics, pqc_wallet_scan, quantum_wallet_generation, quantum_signing_key, quantum_portfolio_monitor, pqc_migration_planner, mev_protection, polymarket_insider_scan, yield_discover, yield_deposit, yield_rebalance, mindyield_vaults_list, mindyield_yield_vault_deposit · Public sink: general_analysis, pqc_migration_planner, agent_context, backtest_strategy, optimize_strategy_params, strategy_allocation_recommendation, generate_video · Destructive: crqc_proximity_benchmark, backtest_strategy, optimize_strategy_params, strategy_allocation_recommendation

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
